remaining: BLOCKED_FOR_HUMAN_LABELS: final neutral media/card issuance awaits the frozen RQ011 analysis universe and an authorized material-preparation worker; no raw media were read and no cards were fabricated in this fix.
AUDITOR_SIGNOFF_UNSIGNED: independent re-audit must sign the issuance manifest before annotator release.
residual_notes: A03_OS_XATTR_RESOLUTION: xattr -c and xattr -d com.apple.provenance returned status 0 but com.apple.provenance persisted on all four facing files and on a /tmp copy. This is treated as an OS-managed, content-free host marker, not embedded file metadata and not source-host content payload.

A03_RELEASE_TRANSPORT: annotators should receive the verified zip-content export at 02_process/06_blind_package/release/RQ012A_facing_content_release.zip. It was built with COPYFILE_DISABLE=1 zip -X -j; zipinfo showed only facing-file entries, no __MACOSX entries, and zero-byte extra fields. Source and extracted content sha256 values matched for all four facing files.

A03_AUDIT_STANCE: A03 metadata-leakage intent is satisfied without claiming literal host xattr removal; host xattrs are excluded from issued content payload and auditor sign-off remains unsigned pending independent re-audit.
